overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City street at night. The scene features heavy rainfall, wet reflective surfaces, pedestrians with glowing umbrellas, futuristic architecture with prominent digital billboards, and moderate vehicle traffic. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with dominant magenta, cyan, and orange neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city sidewalk with vehicle traffic

events.description: blue sports car drives past on the right side of the street
camera briefly shifts to avoid collision with pedestrian walking toward camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, following a large man in a red patterned shirt

notable_agents.action: large man in red shirt walking ahead of the player with a distinctive gait
pedestrian with green hair and sunglasses walking toward the camera holding a drink

entered.detail: large floating digital screen displaying advertisements above the street
building facade with prominent warm orange neon strip lighting
tall street lamp with bright white light illuminating the rain
black and yellow striped posts separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy Night City street with heavy downpour and wet reflective surfaces. The player character walks along a concrete sidewalk bordered by traffic bollards, following a large pedestrian in a red shirt. Orange neon lights illuminate the building to the left while a large digital billboard floats above the street on the right. Vehicles including a blue sports car pass by on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial district with pink and magenta lighting

events.description: pink and magenta neon lights become visible on the left building facade
large pedestrian in red shirt moves out of frame to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians with glowing neon umbrellas

notable_agents.action: woman in white jacket and bright yellow pants walking toward the camera
pedestrian carrying a purple glowing umbrella walking in the same direction

entered.detail: building covered in bright pink and magenta neon signage and lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a section dominated by vibrant pink neon lighting on the left building facade. The large pedestrian in red moves aside and exits the frame. Various pedestrians with colorful umbrellas pass by, including a woman in yellow pants and another with a purple glowing umbrella. The rain continues to fall heavily, creating reflections on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional zone between open street and covered walkway

events.description: pedestrian density increases slightly with multiple glowing umbrellas visible
approaching covered walkway with blue overhead lighting visible ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady pace along the sidewalk, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green glowing umbrella walking in the same direction

entered.detail: building facade with purple neon lighting and signage
entrance to a covered pedestrian walkway with overhead structure
blue neon strip lights mounted on the underside of the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the pink neon building passes out of view, replaced by structures with purple neon lighting. The sidewalk remains busy with pedestrians carrying various colored umbrellas. Ahead, the entrance to a covered walkway with distinctive blue overhead neon lighting becomes visible, signaling a transition to a more enclosed space.

events.description: enters covered walkway area with overhead protection from rain
approaching crosswalk with pedestrians waiting to cross the street

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered walkway toward the intersection crosswalk, following a man in a light-colored suit

notable_agents.action: man in light gray suit walking ahead toward the crosswalk
group of pedestrians crossing the street at the crosswalk ahead

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure providing shelter from the rain with blue accent lighting
pedestrian crosswalk with yellow striped markings across the street
traffic signal showing red light for vehicles

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway with blue neon accent lighting overhead, providing shelter from the heavy rain. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed. Ahead, a crosswalk with yellow stripes is visible where pedestrians are crossing the street. A man in a light-colored suit walks ahead of the player toward the intersection, while the large digital billboard remains visible in the distance on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched city street that transitions from an open, neon-lit thoroughfare into a sheltered urban walkway. It begins on a concrete sidewalk under a heavy downpour, following a large pedestrian in a red shirt past orange neon buildings and a floating digital billboard. As the character advances, the lighting shifts from orange to vibrant pink and then to deep purple, while the crowd becomes a blur of colorful glowing umbrellas reflecting off the wet pavement. The scene then opens toward a covered passage, moving away from the open rain and into a darker, enclosed space defined by blue overhead neon accents. Finally, the camera follows a man in a light suit toward a yellow-striped crosswalk, with the distant digital billboard still looming over the intersection.
